Metadata.title: OpenNext Landing
Metadata.description: A bilingual Next.js landing page with cookie-based localization.

HomePage.title: Ship one landing page in two languages.
HomePage.description: This starter now uses next-intl with a cookie-based locale strategy, so English and Indonesian content can share the same URLs.
HomePage.featureOneDescription: Language preference is stored in a cookie instead of a locale-prefixed route.
HomePage.featureTwoDescription: Server and client UI read from the same translation catalogs.
HomePage.featureThreeDescription: The legacy Paraglide output is removed so the app keeps one i18n path.
